---
title: "Section 6: Variant Showcase"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Callout Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp01.qmd)

- [Quiz Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp02.qmd)

- [Reflection Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp03.qmd)

- [Self-Check Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp04.qmd)

- [Reveal Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp05.qmd)

- [Code Language Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp06.qmd)

- [Math Variants](mod001-se01-sec06-sp07.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../05-computational-and-analytical-learning/mod001-se01-sec05-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Callout Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
